description: Lock Village Settlements to the source-backed Natufian hunter-forager settlement scope rather than horticultural village farming.

checks.reason: The node remains anchored to Eynan/Ain Mallaha's 10000-8200 BCE permanent-settlement range.
The Natufian anchor is described as year-round villages of hunters and foragers using local resources.
Advanced hunter-forager lifeways are the enabling subsistence and ecological context for the settlement anchor.
Built shelter remains a historical predecessor for permanent or semi-permanent settlement.
Horticulture should not be restored unless the node is rescoped away from the Natufian hunter-forager anchor.
